name: nestflow
description: NestFlow AI — intelligent nesting platform for CNC / laser / plotter cutting

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @nestflow/api" "npm run dev -w @nestflow/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @nestflow/engine && npm run build -w @nestflow/web && npm run build -w @nestflow/api
